sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13398" key="a)poperaio/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπο-περαιόω</orth>, <sense id="n13398.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">terminate,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4016.tlg003:54:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ammon.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Int.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">54.29</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
